sentences.target: Tu salis tes mains avec la peinture.
sentences.reading: /ty sa.li te mɛ̃ a.vɛk la pɛ̃.tyʁ/

translations.fr: Tu salis tes mains avec la peinture.
translations.ipa: /ty sa.li te mɛ̃ a.vɛk la pɛ̃.tyʁ/
translations.en: You’re getting your hands dirty with paint.
translations.es: Te estás manchando las manos con pintura.
translations.de: Du machst dir die Hände mit Farbe schmutzig.
translations.it: Ti stai sporcando le mani di vernice.
translations.yue: 你俾油漆整到對手污糟。
translations.pt: Você está sujando as mãos com tinta.
translations.vi: Bạn đang làm tay bị lem sơn.
translations.nl: Je maakt je handen vies met verf.
translations.hi: तुम पेंट से अपने हाथ गंदे कर रहे हो.
translations.el: Λερώνεις τα χέρια σου με μπογιά.
translations.ja: ペンキで手を汚している。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; acts as the sentence subject.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular of 'salir'; transitive, selecting the direct object 'tes mains'.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular possessor), plural form agreeing with 'mains'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'salis'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'peinture'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Il salit tout quand il cuisine.

translations.fr: Il salit tout quand il cuisine.
translations.en: He dirties everything when he cooks.
translations.de: Er macht beim Kochen alles schmutzig.
translations.ko: 그는 요리할 때 모든 걸 더럽힌다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他做饭时把什么都弄脏。
translations.yue: 佢煮嘢食嗰陣乜嘢都整污糟。
translations.vi: Anh ấy làm bẩn mọi thứ khi nấu ăn.
translations.ar: هو يوسخ كل شيء عندما يطبخ.
translations.nl: Hij maakt alles vies als hij kookt.
translations.hi: वह जब खाना बनाता है तो सब कुछ गंदा कर देता है.
translations.nb: Han gjør alt skittent når han lager mat.
translations.sv: Han gör allt smutsigt när han lagar mat.
translations.da: Han sviner det hele til, når han laver mad.
translations.ja: 彼は料理をするとき何でも汚す。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular of 'salir'; transitive.
Indefinite pronoun functioning as a direct object ('everything').
Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal clause.
Subject pronoun of the subordinate clause.
Main verb of the subordinate clause, present indicative 3rd person singular.

sentences.target: On doit éviter de salir le canapé.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dwa e.vi.te də sa.li lə ka.na.pe/

translations.fr: On doit éviter de salir le canapé.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa e.vi.te də sa.li lə ka.na.pe/
translations.en: We should avoid dirtying the couch.
translations.de: Wir sollten vermeiden, das Sofa schmutzig zu machen.
translations.it: Dobbiamo evitare di sporcare il divano.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们得避免把沙发弄脏。
translations.yue: 我哋要避免整污糟張梳化。
translations.ru: Нам нужно стараться не пачкать диван.
translations.vi: Chúng ta nên tránh làm bẩn ghế sofa.
translations.nl: We moeten voorkomen dat de bank vies wordt.
translations.uk: Нам слід намагатися не бруднити диван.
translations.hu: El kell kerülni, hogy összekoszoljuk a kanapét.
translations.hi: हमें सोफे को गंदा करने से बचना चाहिए.
translations.el: Πρέπει να αποφύγουμε να λερώσουμε τον καναπέ.
translations.nb: Vi bør unngå å skitne til sofaen.
translations.sv: Vi bör undvika att smutsa ner soffan.
translations.ro: Ar trebui să evităm să murdărim canapeaua.
translations.cs: Měli bychom se vyhnout tomu, abychom ušpinili pohovku.
translations.da: Vi bør undgå at gøre sofaen beskidt.
translations.ja: ソファを汚さないようにすべきだ。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; takes 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Present indicative 3rd person singular of 'devoir'; modal-like verb of obligation governing the infinitive 'éviter'.
Infinitive verb complement to 'doit'; head of the non-finite phrase 'éviter de salir'.
Preposition required after 'éviter' to introduce an infinitive complement; links to 'salir'.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement of 'éviter'; selects the direct object 'le canapé'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'canapé'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'salir'.

sentences.target: Nous salissons le sol avec nos bottes.
sentences.reading: /nu sa.li.sɔ̃ lə sɔl a.vɛk no bɔt/

translations.fr: Nous salissons le sol avec nos bottes.
translations.ipa: /nu sa.li.sɔ̃ lə sɔl a.vɛk no bɔt/
translations.en: We’re dirtying the floor with our boots.
translations.es: Estamos ensuciando el suelo con nuestras botas.
translations.de: Wir machen den Boden mit unseren Stiefeln schmutzig.
translations.it: Sporchiamo il pavimento con i nostri stivali.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的靴子把地板弄脏了。
translations.yue: 我哋啲靴整污糟咗地下。
translations.pt: Estamos sujando o chão com nossas botas.
translations.he: אנחנו מלכלכים את הרצפה עם המגפיים שלנו.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang làm bẩn sàn nhà bằng ủng của mình.
translations.nl: We maken de vloer vies met onze laarzen.
translations.hi: हम अपनी बूटों से फर्श गंदा कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Λερώνουμε το πάτωμα με τις μπότες μας.
translations.nb: Vi gjør gulvet skittent med støvlene våre.
translations.id: Kami mengotori lantai dengan sepatu bot kami.
translations.sv: Vi smutsar ner golvet med våra stövlar.
translations.da: Vi gør gulvet beskidt med vores støvler.
translations.ja: ブーツで床を汚している。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural of 'salir'; transitive.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'sol'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'salissons'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental phrase.
Possessive determiner (1st person plural possessor), plural form agreeing with 'bottes'.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition 'avec'.
